name: alpha-assistant
changelog: New hires get their Notion onboarding card walked through step by step
Existing employees skip the onboarding and go straight to helping you work
Canonical Alpha pages are now hardcoded so you don't need to paste URLs
changelog_semver: Contract v1.1: Rule 5 split into new-hire vs existing-employee flows
Added onboarding/new-hire-flow.md orchestration playbook for the New Hire Onboarding database
NOTION-SYNC.md now hardcodes the canonical Alpha Notion URLs
Onboarding templates (company/team/role) point at real Operating Framework + Team directory
First manifest.json shipped — update checks now work

download._note: sha256 + size are populated in the release-attached copy of this manifest. The in-repo copy intentionally omits them because its own hash would be a self-reference. Assistants read the remote manifest via manifest_url to get the live numbers.
